projectDescription: An interactive educational web experience exploring 10 endangered marine animals in Thai waters, rendered as animated low-poly polygon art with parallax scroll effects and ambient ocean sounds.
keyFeatures: Low-poly polygon art visualization of 10 endangered Thai marine animals
Immersive parallax scroll experience with underwater atmosphere
Three-stage interactive journey: Explore → Details → Polygon Art
3D underwater environment built with React Three Fiber and Three.js
Bilingual animal information (Thai/English) covering introduction, threats, and conservation
Ambient ocean sound controller with background music
Animated shard assembly/disassembly for each animal on the detail page
Responsive design with mobile-friendly scrubber navigation
Marine snow particle effects and animated light rays
Depth indicator showing scroll progress as ocean depth (0–2000m)
publicApiSurface: ANIMALS array (src/data/animalConfig.js) - polygon shard definitions for each animal
animalDetails.json (src/data/animalDetails.json) - bilingual animal info (intro, threat, solution)
ParallaxElement component (src/pages/Landing.jsx) - reusable scroll-driven parallax wrapper
AnimalInfoBox component (src/pages/Landing.jsx) - animal information overlay card
AnimalCard component (src/components/AnimalCard.jsx) - individual animal display card
